meta.notes: Thematic fit overrides raw hook_score. p1 (hook 9.0, energy 9.5, race-scream) is the highest-scoring candidate by hook_score but is correctly DROPPED — its 'screams, pumps fist' description contradicts copy_tone=calm + creative_direction=introspective study-vlog. This is the dimension a 'best hook_score wins' heuristic gets wrong; the eval exists to catch that miss.
